nasb.text: in the power of signs and wonders, in the power of the Spirit; so that from Jerusalem and round about as far as Illyricum I have fully preached the gospel of Christ.

esv.text: by the power of signs and wonders, by the power of the Spirit of God—so that from Jerusalem and all the way around to Illyricum I have fulfilled the ministry of the gospel of Christ;

csbs.text: 藉着神迹、奇事的能力和圣灵的能力所完成的事。结果我从耶路撒冷及其周围一带直到伊利里亚，把基督的福音都传遍了。
